urdu transliteration text: ILAAHI BA BIMAR DASHTE BALAA, JO BIMAR HO JALD PAWE SHAFA
english translation text: O LORD! DISPEL ALL MISFORTUNES AND GRANT FULL RECOVERY SOONEST TO ALL THOSE WHO ARE ILL AND DISPOSED.

urdu transliteration text: ILAAHI BARAAYE IMAAM E ZAMAAN, HAME HAWLE MEHSHAR SE DE TU AMAAN.
english translation text: O LORD! FOR THE SAKE OF IMAAME ZAMAANA PLEASE GRANT US IMMUNITY ON THE DAY OF JUDGENMENT.

urdu transliteration text: QIYAAMAT KO MAHSHUR HO BA ALI, UTHE KABR SE KEHKE HAM YAA ALI
english translation text: ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT MAY WE STAY WITH ALI AND WHEN WE RAISE FROM OUR GRAVES MAY WE RISE SAYING O ALI.

urdu transliteration text:
HAI PAANCH WA NAW, MIL CHAHARDA HATAN, AHMED WA ALI, ZEHRA WA HASSAN, SHABBIR SE LE TA IMAAME ZAMAAN
THERE ARE FIVE PANJETAN AHMED (PROHET MUHAMMAD (PBUH) AND ALI (AS), ZEHRA (BIBI FATEMA (AS) AND IMAM HASSAN (AS) FROM SHABBIR (IMAM HUSSEIN (AS) TO IMAM-E-ZAMAANA (AS)
EK EK PE SADAA SALAWAAT PARO, SALAWAAT.
english translation text: CALL UPON AND SEND YOUR BLESSINGS ON EACH ONE OF THEM.

urdu transliteration text: SALAWAAT PE USKE NISAARE GHAUHAR JO NABI HAI BULAND SIFAAT HUWE, SALAWAAT.
english translation text: SEND BLESSINGS ON THE ONE WHOM ALL PRECIOUS THINGS CAN BE SACRIFICED, THE PROPHET WHO HAS PRESTIGIOUS QUALITIES. SALAWAAT.

urdu transliteration text: SALAWAAT O SALAAM YA IMAAM –E- ZAMAAN FARMAWO ZUHUR YA IMAAM-E-ZAMAAN, SALAWAAT
english translation text:
OUR BLESSINGS AND PEACE BE UPON TH IMAM OF OUR TIME.
HASTEN YOUR APPEARANCE IMAM OF OUR TIME,
